SEARCH

Package cpdt.simulator.mqtt

package cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.

This package contains the MQTT client implementation responsible for establishing broker connections, serializing telemetry data, and publishing messages to the appropriate MQTT topics. It enables the simulator to communicate with downstream consumers, such as the backend digital twin as well as receive data from the backend for updates of device status.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    cpdt.simulator
    Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
    cpdt.simulator.bootstrap
     
    cpdt.simulator.devices
    Contains implementations of simulated devices, including sensors and future actuators.
    cpdt.simulator.engine
    Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
    cpdt.simulator.environment
    Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.
    cpdt.simulator.scenarios
    Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DeviceStatusSubscriber
    DeviceStatusSubscriber subscribes to backend-published device status updates over MQTT and applies them to the simulator in real time.
    MqttTelemetryPublisher
    MQTT implementation of the TelemetryPublisher interface responsible for publishing telemetry packets generated by the simulator.
